problem_statement:
Given a matrix mat of size N x M where every element is either 芒聙聵O芒聙聶 or 芒聙聵X芒聙聶.
    Replace all 芒聙聵O芒聙聶 with 芒聙聵X芒聙聶 that is surrounded by 芒聙聵X芒聙聶. An 芒聙聵O芒聙聶 (or a set of 芒聙聵O芒聙聶) is considered to be surrounded by 芒聙聵X芒聙聶
    if there are 芒聙聵X芒聙聶 at locations just below, just above just left, and just right of it.
